error_signature: Google Sheet only processes one data item
title: Google Sheet not updating multiple rows
symptom: When attempting to update multiple rows in Google Sheets, only the first row is updated, and the rest are ignored.
applies_when: Outputting multiple rows from a previous node
not_this_if: Only one row is being outputted from the previous node
root_cause: The Google Sheets node is designed to process a single data item at a time. If multiple items are returned as a single object, the node will only handle the first item, leading to incomplete updates.
fix_steps: Add a 'Split Out' node after the Gemini output node
Configure the 'Split Out' node to separate the multiple items into individual entries
Connect the output of the 'Split Out' node to the Google Sheets node
agent_instruction: Insert a 'Split Out' node to separate the multiple data items before they reach the Google Sheets node.
